name: Morphing Text
description: Cycles through an array of words using blur-fade morph transitions. Text blurs out, swaps at midpoint, then sharpens into the next word.

texts.description: Array of words to cycle through

holdDuration.description: Milliseconds to hold each word before morphing

morphDuration.description: Milliseconds for the blur-fade morph transition

className.description: CSS class for the span element

conflicts: blur filter can cause jank on low-end mobile if morphDuration is very short
usage_tip: Best for hero tagline word rotation; keep word count under 6 for impact.
